Interior Plaster in Guadalupe County, TX

Star Stucco of Austin serves Guadalupe County with professional interior plaster work. From the historic homes of Seguin to the growing communities of Schertz and Cibolo, we provide hand-applied wall finishes that bring texture, color, and enduring quality to your interior spaces.

Get a Free EstimateCall (512) 706-9699

Distinctive Plaster Finishes for Guadalupe County Homes

Guadalupe County spans the corridor between Austin and San Antonio, giving it a diverse mix of housing that ranges from historic Seguin properties built during the town's early prosperity to the master-planned communities rapidly expanding in Schertz, Cibolo, and Marion. Interior plaster serves homeowners at both ends of that range — restoring character in old homes and adding it to new ones.

Seguin's downtown and surrounding neighborhoods contain some of the best-preserved 19th-century architecture in South Central Texas. Many of these homes have original plaster walls that benefit from skilled restoration. At the same time, the German and Mexican heritage influences visible in the town's architecture align naturally with the Old World quality of hand-applied plaster finishes.

The newer developments in Schertz and Cibolo are among the fastest-growing in the San Antonio metro area. Homes in these communities typically feature standard drywall with builder-grade textures. Interior plaster — whether a full skim coat or a targeted accent wall — is one of the most effective ways for homeowners to differentiate their space and add lasting value.

What's Included With Our Interior Plaster in Guadalupe County

Every project includes expert craftsmanship, quality materials, and a commitment to lasting results.

Design Consultation

We visit your Guadalupe County home to assess wall conditions, discuss design options, and show you tactile finish samples. A written estimate follows the consultation.

Surface Preparation

Walls are cleaned, repaired, and primed for plaster adhesion. We protect all surrounding surfaces — flooring, cabinetry, trim, and furnishings — before work begins.

Base Coat Application

A bonding base coat is applied across each surface, creating the stable foundation that the finish coat requires. The product is chosen based on the wall substrate and finish type.

Decorative Finish Application

The finish layer is hand-troweled in one or more passes to build the selected texture. Our plasterers monitor consistency across each wall to ensure a uniform result.

Color Matching & Tinting

Pigments are mixed into the plaster for permanent, through-body color. We develop custom shades that complement your home's interior design and existing color scheme.

Protective Sealing & Cleanup

The cured surface is sealed to protect against staining and moisture. We remove all coverings, clean up the work area, and leave your home ready to enjoy.

Common Interior Plaster Needs in Guadalupe County

Guadalupe County homeowners request interior plaster for a wide range of projects. Here are the services we see most demand for in this area.

Smooth Wall Finishes

Builder-grade textures are standard in the Schertz and Cibolo subdivisions. A smooth skim coat eliminates that rough surface and gives rooms a polished, contemporary feel that stands out from neighboring homes.

Decorative Plaster Accents

Accent walls in dining rooms, around fireplaces, and in entryways are popular upgrade projects for Guadalupe County homeowners who want to add character without a full renovation.

Venetian Plaster

Venetian plaster's layered, polished appearance suits the formal living spaces and primary suites found in Seguin's grander historic homes and the custom builds in Guadalupe County's newer communities.

Interior Wall Restoration

Seguin's historic homes sometimes have plaster walls that have cracked, bubbled, or separated from the substrate over many decades. We stabilize and restore these surfaces to preserve their historic character.

Custom Textures for Feature Walls

From soft, Old World textures inspired by the area's German and Mexican architectural heritage to clean contemporary patterns, we create feature walls tailored to your space.

Skim Coating Over Textured Walls

Skim coating is a popular update for homeowners throughout Guadalupe County who want to replace dated wall textures with a smooth, modern surface ready for paint.

Why Choose Us for Interior Plaster in Guadalupe County?

  • Artisan craftsmanship that delivers refined results in both historic restorations and production-home upgrades
  • Broad selection of finishes from smooth skim coats to decorative Venetian, lime wash, and marmorino
  • Precise color formulation that coordinates plaster with your home's existing design elements
  • Thorough interior protection practices that safeguard your home from the first step to the last
  • Focused attention to edges, transitions, and detail that defines truly professional plaster work
  • Custom solutions developed for the specific style and condition of your Guadalupe County home

Licensed & Insured

Full liability coverage and workers' compensation for every project in Guadalupe County.

20+ Years Experience

Decades of hands-on stucco work across Central Texas residential and commercial properties.

Certified Applicators

Certified by Sto Corp, Senergy/BASF, Master Wall, Dryvit, and Parex LaHabra for the highest quality results.

Our Interior Plaster Process

A straightforward approach from start to finish — no surprises, no shortcuts.

1

Design Consultation

We meet at your Guadalupe County home to inspect the walls and present finish options. Sample boards let you compare textures and colors in person before deciding.

2

Surface Preparation & Priming

All surfaces are repaired and primed. For Seguin's older homes, we evaluate existing plaster or masonry conditions and adjust our preparation to match.

3

Plaster Application & Finishing

Base and finish coats are applied in the proper sequence. Our crew works each wall fully before progressing, maintaining consistent texture and color throughout.

4

Final Review & Touch-Ups

We walk the project with you, checking every surface. Any refinements are made on the spot, and the sealer is applied to finalize the job.
